title: Biomarkers for oesophageal squamous cell carcinoma and the role of HPV: Multi‑omics approaches and current evidence (Review).
snippet: Oesophageal squamous cell carcinoma (ESCC) represents a major global health burden, particularly in regions with high incidence rates, significantly affecting patient quality of life and survival outcomes. Recent advances in multi‑omics technologies have highlighted their potential in identifying prognostic markers for ESCC. Concurrently, the possibl...
